C3.label: Control effort (kWh_ctrl): PID+Gate vs PID-only
C3.test_rule: Shapiro-Wilk on paired diffs: if p >= 0.05 ttest_rel, else Wilcoxon. alpha=0.05.

C5.label: SLA non-inferiority: PID+Gate vs PID-only
C5.Delta_sla_violations_note: Gate may have at most 10% more total SLA violations than PID (fraction of PID total). Non-inferiority passes if gate_total <= pid_total * (1 + Delta).
C5.Delta_max_exceedance_note: Gate max exceedance may exceed PID max exceedance by at most 0.02 (absolute). Non-inferiority passes if gate_max_exc <= pid_max_exc + Delta.

pairing: same seed, same morphology (Xylem), different controller
seed_qualification: trigger-qualified: T_max(q=0.005, gate=off) > T_SLA for Xylem morphology
